title: Need help creating time log report
excerpt: We’re looking at setting up a report that shows how much time a team member has logged against tasks assigned to them account-wide. We’ve got between 250 and 300 boards (one for each client). The time tracking widget is …

posts.author: ALittler (Alan Littler)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re looking at setting up a report that shows how much time a team member has logged against tasks assigned to them account-wide. We’ve got between 250 and 300 boards (one for each client). The time tracking widget is restricted to just five boards, making creating this report difficult. Has anyone else been in a similar situation and found a resolution?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: When you have that many (project) boards, reporting will be a pain. I recommend to build a master board that aggregates data from the project boards and report from that master board. The Rollup Multiple Boards app can help to achieve that.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ALittler I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful. With it, you can create time tracking reports and schedule them to be sent via email or Slack. You can learn more from blog post:

screenful.com

Creating reports from monday.com time tracking data - Screenful Blog
